items.name_en: 👄FENDI New Iconic Baguette Medium Handbag, Trousseau fabric, FF jacquard pattern in dove grey. Accented with tonal leather details and FF buckle. The bag comes with a removable leather handle and shoulder strap, for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear. Model: F6221, Dimensions: 27*6*15cm

items.name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This medium tote bag features an adjustable handle with grommets, inspired by the equestrian world.
items.name_cn:
🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This medium tote bag features an adjustable handle with grommets, inspired by the equestrian world.
Black glossy leather
Black microfiber lining
Also comes with a D-ring for hanging removable items
Grommet adjustable handle; Height 21.5cm - 31.5cm
Interior: 2 compartments and 1 central zip compartment
Magnetic snap closure
Model: 815213.
Dimensions: 38cm (W) x 25cm (H) x 15cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.85kg
Color: Black/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】Medium shoulder bag from the GG Emblem series
items.name_cn:
🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】Medium shoulder bag from the GG Emblem series
The GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, handcrafted as a collectible choice for years to come. This medium shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's new iconic collection, featuring a adjustable shoulder strap with grommets, paying tribute to Gucci's history with the equestrian world.
Black glossy leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Gold-tone Gucci script print
Black microfiber lining
Also comes with a D-ring for hanging removable items
Grommets on adjustable shoulder strap
Interior: 1 zip pocket
Zipper closure
Weight: approx. 0.5kg
Fits: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, long wallet, and lipstick
Model: 815217.
Medium Dimensions: 37cm (W) x 23cm (H) x 8cm (D)
Color: Black full leather/Original leather.

items.name_cn:
🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】Gucci Blondie Medium Tote
The new Gucci Blondie bag features the brand's classic logo that first appeared in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style, perfectly interpreting the brand's classic design and modern essence. This medium tote is crafted from beige and dark brown Original GG canvas, featuring a detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap.
Model: 815716.
Size: 32(L) x 17(H) x 10cm(D).
Color: Beige full leather/Original leather.
Italian creation
